input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Toronto General Hospital. There are 71 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "respiratory", "count": 12, "message": "12 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "cardiac", "count": 11, "message": "11 cardiac patients incoming", "protocol": "Pre-alert cath lab \u2014 multiple cardiac presentations"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 14, "message": "14 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "pain", "count": 12, "message": "12 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}, {"category": "neuro", "count": 5, "message": "5 neuro patients incoming", "protocol": "Stroke code readiness \u2014 cluster of neuro presentations"}, {"category": "injury", "count": 6, "message": "6 injury patients incoming", "protocol": "Mass casualty protocol consideration"}, {"category": "mental", "count": 5, "message": "5 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}, {"category": "general", "count": 6, "message": "6 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": null, "current_utilization": 118, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "St. Michael's Hospital", "facility_id": "st-michaels", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to St. Michael's Hospital (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "SickKids Hospital", "facility_id": "sickkids", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to SickKids Hospital (0% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content:
Toronto General Hospital is experiencing high demand with 71 incoming patients and 118% current utilization, yet capacity is projected as stable for the next 2 hours.
Activate isolation protocols for the 12 respiratory and 14 GI patients, pre-alert the cath lab for 11 cardiac patients, and consider crisis team activation for 5 mental health patients.
Divert all stable CTAS 4-5 patients to CAMH, St. Michael's, or SickKids Hospital, as all have 0% utilization.
